description: Read-only routing recommender. Does NOT approve, block, or invoke subagents.

capabilities.route_plan: Given scope description, recommend required subagents for plan mode
capabilities.route_build: Given modified files, recommend required subagents for build mode
capabilities.summarize_scope: Generate scope summary from list of files

command_patterns.route <scope> [plan|build]: Recommend subagents for given scope and mode
command_patterns.stats: Return routing statistics (how many times routed, common patterns)
